nodes.name: Fury of Xoroth
nodes.desc: Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

rankDesc.description:
Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

rankDesc.description: Your critical strikes now enrage you, increasing your melee attack speed by 15%.

nodes.name: Dismemberment
nodes.desc: Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now reduces the target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now reduces the target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Ragefist
nodes.desc: Increases your maximum Rage by 10 and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -15%.

rankDesc.description: Increases your maximum Rage by 10 and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -15%.
Increases your maximum Rage by 20 and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -30%.

nodes.name: Fiend of Forges
nodes.desc: Forgefiend's Bulwark now also increases your critical strike chance by 10%.

rankDesc.description: Forgefiend's Bulwark now also increases your critical strike chance by 10%.

nodes.name: Hellfire Reprimand
nodes.desc: Your Hellfire Imps now have a 20% chance on hit to launch a firebolt dealing 40% Strength Fire damage and reducing enemy attack power by 190 for 10 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Your Hellfire Imps now have a 20% chance on hit to launch a firebolt dealing 40% Strength Fire damage and reducing enemy attack power by 190 for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Stoke the Flames
nodes.desc: Your Skulltaker and Melt used with 6 Demonfire now refund 2 Demonfire.Skulltaker used with 6 Demonfire now deals an additional 30% Fire damage.

rankDesc.description:
Your Skulltaker and Melt used with 6 Demonfire now refund 2 Demonfire.

Skulltaker used with 6 Demonfire now deals an additional 30% Fire damage.

nodes.name: Pestilent Retaliation
nodes.desc: When you block an attack you now have a 5% chance to unleash your active Pestilence at half of its effectiveness.Can only occur once every 5 sec.

rankDesc.description:
When you block an attack you now have a 5% chance to unleash your active Pestilence at half of its effectiveness.

Can only occur once every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Heart of Xoroth
nodes.desc: Allows Demon's Blood to stack 5 additional times.

rankDesc.description: Allows Demon's Blood to stack 5 additional times.

nodes.name: Harbinger of Pestilence
nodes.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Pestilences by 50%.

rankDesc.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Pestilences by 50%.

nodes.name: Spiked Chains
nodes.desc: Your Chainwhip now deals 321 + 30% AP additional Physical damage, increased by 100% on Humanoids.

rankDesc.description: Your Chainwhip now deals 321 + 30% AP additional Physical damage, increased by 100% on Humanoids.

nodes.name: Shadowflame Forge
nodes.desc: Increases the duration of Hellmaw by 3 sec.

rankDesc.description: Increases the duration of Hellmaw by 3 sec.
Increases the duration of Hellmaw by 6 sec.

nodes.name: Hellstorm
nodes.desc: Create a hellstorm, dealing 77 + 32.04% fire SP + 8% AP Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.Embers then flare every 1 sec for 2 seconds, dealing 28 + 2.5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire damage.Duration is increased by 100% for each stack of Demonfire consumed.

rankDesc.description:
Create a hellstorm, dealing 77 + 32.04% fire SP + 8% AP Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Embers then flare every 1 sec for 2 seconds, dealing 28 + 2.5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire damage.

Duration is increased by 100% for each stack of Demonfire consumed.

nodes.name: Hook, Line, and Sinker
nodes.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Flesh Hook and Chainwhip by -5 sec.

rankDesc.description: Reduces the cooldown of Flesh Hook and Chainwhip by -5 sec.

nodes.name: Inferno Blast
nodes.desc: Increases your critical damage against Burning targets by 20%.

rankDesc.description: Increases your critical damage against Burning targets by 20%.
Increases your critical damage against Burning targets by 40%.

nodes.name: Hellfire Embers
nodes.desc: Increases the Fire damage dealt by your Hellfire Imp by 30% against enemies above 80% maximum health.

rankDesc.description: Increases the Fire damage dealt by your Hellfire Imp by 30% against enemies above 80% maximum health.

nodes.name: Doom
nodes.desc: Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds.While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20% more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.

rankDesc.description:
Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds.

While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20% more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.

nodes.name: Infernal Pummeling
nodes.desc: Melt now increases the damage your target takes from Flames of Xoroth and Skulltaker by 10%.

rankDesc.description: Melt now increases the damage your target takes from Flames of Xoroth and Skulltaker by 10%.

nodes.name: To Ashes
nodes.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of abilities that spend Demonfire by 5%.

rankDesc.description: Increases the critical strike chance of abilities that spend Demonfire by 5%.

nodes.name: Burning Rage
nodes.desc: Enrage, generating 15 Rage every 1 sec and making you immune to incapacitate, banish, and polymorph effects for 6 seconds.Usable while incapacitated, banished, or polymorphed.

rankDesc.description:
Enrage, generating 15 Rage every 1 sec and making you immune to incapacitate, banish, and polymorph effects for 6 seconds.

Usable while incapacitated, banished, or polymorphed.

nodes.name: Omen of Rage
nodes.desc: Periodic damage and healing done has a 10% chance to grant a stack of Demonfire.

rankDesc.description: Periodic damage and healing done has a 10% chance to grant a stack of Demonfire.

nodes.name: Darkrider
nodes.desc: Increases the duration of your Mark spells by 50%.

rankDesc.description: Increases the duration of your Mark spells by 50%.

nodes.name: Hand of Doom
nodes.desc: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Sever by 10%, increased by 10% for each Demonfire you have active.

rankDesc.description: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Sever by 10%, increased by 10% for each Demonfire you have active.

nodes.name: Hellknight
nodes.desc: While above 75% health, all direct Physical damage dealt will grant a stack of Hellknight.HellknightMovement speed increased and global cooldowns reduced by -5%. Physical Damage and critical strike chance increased by 1%, stacking 5 times. Lasts 20 seconds.

rankDesc.description:
While above 75% health, all direct Physical damage dealt will grant a stack of Hellknight.
Hellknight
Movement speed increased and global cooldowns reduced by -5%. Physical Damage and critical strike chance increased by 1%, stacking 5 times. Lasts 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Mutilation
nodes.desc: Increases the damage of Gore and Sever by 10%.

rankDesc.description: Increases the damage of Gore and Sever by 10%.
Increases the damage of Gore and Sever by 20%.
Increases the damage of Gore and Sever by 30%.

nodes.name: Implosion
nodes.desc: Explode with hellish fire, dealing 51 + 25% Strength + 50% fire SP + 10% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, beckoning Hellfire Imps to aid you in battle for 12 seconds, and generating 30 Rage.Deals increased damage and increases the amount of imps summoned by 1 for each Demonfire consumed.

rankDesc.description:
Explode with hellish fire, dealing 51 + 25% Strength + 50% fire SP + 10% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, beckoning Hellfire Imps to aid you in battle for 12 seconds, and generating 30 Rage.

Deals increased damage and increases the amount of imps summoned by 1 for each Demonfire consumed.

nodes.name: Bringer of Destruction / Absolutism
nodes.desc: Critical damage taken now grants you 1 Demonfire and 5 Rage. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

rankDesc.description: Critical damage taken now grants you 1 Demonfire and 5 Rage. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

nodes.name: Burning Swings / Hellsmelted
nodes.desc: Your Burning Blade now affects 4 additional attacks.

rankDesc.description: Your Burning Blade now affects 4 additional attacks.

nodes.name: Boiling Blood / Suffusion of Essence
nodes.desc: Casting Suffuse now increases your healing received by 25% for the first 6 seconds of it's duration.

rankDesc.description: Casting Suffuse now increases your healing received by 25% for the first 6 seconds of it's duration.

nodes.name: Warpath / Hellbreaker
nodes.desc: While Unleash Pestilence is active it now protects your movement speed from being reduced below 90% of normal speed.

rankDesc.description: While Unleash Pestilence is active it now protects your movement speed from being reduced below 90% of normal speed.

nodes.name: Mounted Reaver / Mounted Champion
nodes.desc: Reduces the cooldown of all Mounted Combat abilities by -20%.

rankDesc.description: Reduces the cooldown of all Mounted Combat abilities by -20%.

nodes.name: Claws of Hell / Calamity
nodes.desc: When you spend at least 4 Demonfire stacks you now refresh the duration of your Unleash Apocalypse on the target.

rankDesc.description: When you spend at least 4 Demonfire stacks you now refresh the duration of your Unleash Apocalypse on the target.

nodes.name: Xorothian Empowerment / Hellbringer
nodes.desc: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

rankDesc.description: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

nodes.name: Partners in Flames / Unbound Inferno
nodes.desc: Fire damage dealt by your Greater Imp now has a 25% chance to empower you, increasing your damage dealt by 5% for 10 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Fire damage dealt by your Greater Imp now has a 25% chance to empower you, increasing your damage dealt by 5% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Brimstone Flames / Brimstone Splinters
nodes.desc: Damage dealt by Seeking Flame is increased by 20% on enemies affected by Pestilence of Apocalypse.Damage dealt is increased by an additional 10% for each Demonfire you have active.

rankDesc.description:
Damage dealt by Seeking Flame is increased by 20% on enemies affected by Pestilence of Apocalypse.

Damage dealt is increased by an additional 10% for each Demonfire you have active.

nodes.name: Imp Gang Boss / Impcaller
nodes.desc: Your Call: Hellfire Imp now summons 2 additional imps.

rankDesc.description: Your Call: Hellfire Imp now summons 2 additional imps.

nodes.name: Speed Demon / Brimstone Knight

rankDesc.description: Your Suffuse now increases your movement speed by 20%.

nodes.desc: Damage dealt by Stoke the Flames now reduces the cooldown of Sever and Juggernaut by -4 sec.

rankDesc.description: Damage dealt by Stoke the Flames now reduces the cooldown of Sever and Juggernaut by -4 sec.

nodes.name: Hellfire Bellows / Black Skull Shield
nodes.desc: Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Hellfire Bellows.Hellfire BellowsBellow fire on all enemies in a 6 yd cone in front of and behind you, dealing 252 + 17.63% AP + 40% fire SP Fire damage and reducing the cooldown of Chains of Xoroth by -4 sec per enemy hit.Cooldown is reduced by -3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

rankDesc.description:
Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Hellfire Bellows.
Hellfire Bellows
Bellow fire on all enemies in a 6 yd cone in front of and behind you, dealing 252 + 17.63% AP + 40% fire SP Fire damage and reducing the cooldown of Chains of Xoroth by -4 sec per enemy hit.

Cooldown is reduced by -3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.
